mapper.select: select count(*) num from( SELECT m1.VALUE AS province, tia2.txt AS professional, DATE_FORMAT(t1.check_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date_time, t1.alarm_total AS alarm_total, CONCAT(t1.region_id_rate,'%') AS region_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.city_id_rate,'%') AS city_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.vendor_id_rate,'%') AS vendor_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.active_status_rate,'%') AS active_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_resource_status_rate,'%') AS alarm_resource_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.sheet_send_status_rate,'%') AS sheet_send_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.sheet_status_rate,'%') AS sheet_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.org_severity_rate,'%') AS org_severity_rate, CONCAT(t1.standard_flag_rate,'%') AS standard_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.ack_flag_rate,'%') AS ack_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.object_class_rate,'%') AS object_class_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_object_class_rate,'%') AS eqp_object_class_rate, CONCAT(t1.event_time_rate,'%') AS event_time_rate, CONCAT(t1.cancel_time_rate,'%') AS cancel_time_rate, CONCAT(t1.omc_alarm_id_rate,'%') AS omc_alarm_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_title_text_rate,'%') AS alarm_title_text_rate, CONCAT(t1.vendor_severity_rate,'%') AS vendor_severity_rate, CONCAT(t1.vendor_type_rate,'%') AS vendor_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.probable_cause_txt_rate,'%') AS probable_cause_txt_rate, CONCAT(t1.probable_cause_rate,'%') AS probable_cause_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_label_rate,'%') AS ne_label_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_label_rate,'%') AS eqp_label_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field0_rate,'%') AS special_field0_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field1_rate,'%') AS special_field1_rate, CONCAT(t1.china_tower_site_no_rate,'%') AS china_tower_site_no_rate, CONCAT(t1.proj_name_rate,'%') AS proj_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.proj_oa_file_id_rate,'%') AS proj_oa_file_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.sheet_no_rate,'%') AS sheet_no_rate, CONCAT(t1.sheet_send_person_rate,'%') AS sheet_send_person_rate, CONCAT(t1.standard_alarm_name_rate,'%') AS standard_alarm_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.standard_alarm_id_rate,'%') AS standard_alarm_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.effect_ne_rate,'%') AS effect_ne_rate, CONCAT(t1.effect_service_rate,'%') AS effect_service_rate, CONCAT(t1.ems_id_rate,'%') AS ems_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.ack_time_rate,'%') AS ack_time_rate, CONCAT(t1.ack_user_rate,'%') AS ack_user_rate, CONCAT(t1.admin_grid_id_rate,'%') AS admin_grid_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_abnormal_type_rate,'%') AS alarm_abnormal_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_act_count_rate,'%') AS alarm_act_count_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_check_rate,'%') AS alarm_check_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_content_rate,'%') AS alarm_content_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_eqp_status_rate,'%') AS alarm_eqp_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.Alarm_Explanation_addition_rate,'%') AS Alarm_Explanation_addition_rate, CONCAT(t1.ALARM_EXPLANATION_rate,'%') AS ALARM_EXPLANATION_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_important_level_rate,'%') AS alarm_important_level_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_ne_status_rate,'%') AS alarm_ne_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_origin_rate,'%') AS alarm_origin_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_reason_rate,'%') AS alarm_reason_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_source_rate,'%') AS alarm_source_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_title_rate,'%') AS alarm_title_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_unit_rate,'%') AS alarm_unit_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_value_rate,'%') AS alarm_value_rate, CONCAT(t1.alert_status_rate,'%') AS alert_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.attachment_rate,'%') AS attachment_rate, CONCAT(t1.board_type_rate,'%') AS board_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.business_layer_rate,'%') AS business_layer_rate, CONCAT(t1.business_region_ids_rate,'%') AS business_region_ids_rate, CONCAT(t1.business_regions_rate,'%') AS business_regions_rate, CONCAT(t1.business_system_rate,'%') AS business_system_rate, CONCAT(t1.cancel_user_rate,'%') AS cancel_user_rate, CONCAT(t1.channel_num_rate,'%') AS channel_num_rate, CONCAT(t1.channel_type_rate,'%') AS channel_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.circuit_fault_location_rate,'%') AS circuit_fault_location_rate, CONCAT(t1.circuit_id_rate,'%') AS circuit_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.circuit_no_rate,'%') AS circuit_no_rate, CONCAT(t1.corr_str_rate,'%') AS corr_str_rate, CONCAT(t1.correlate_alarm_flag_rate,'%') AS correlate_alarm_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.dal_action_rate,'%') AS dal_action_rate, CONCAT(t1.department_process_flag_rate,'%') AS department_process_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_alias_rate,'%') AS eqp_alias_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_idn_rate,'%') AS eqp_idn_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_int_id_rate,'%') AS eqp_int_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_object_class_text_rate,'%') AS eqp_object_class_text_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_version_rate,'%') AS eqp_version_rate, CONCAT(t1.event_cat_rate,'%') AS event_cat_rate, CONCAT(t1.event_id_rate,'%') AS event_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.extra_id1_rate,'%') AS extra_id1_rate, CONCAT(t1.extra_id2_rate,'%') AS extra_id2_rate, CONCAT(t1.extra_id3_rate,'%') AS extra_id3_rate, CONCAT(t1.extra_string1_rate,'%') AS extra_string1_rate, CONCAT(t1.extra_string2_rate,'%') AS extra_string2_rate, CONCAT(t1.extra_string3_rate,'%') AS extra_string3_rate, CONCAT(t1.fail_reason_rate,'%') AS fail_reason_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_client_grade_mgt_rate,'%') AS gcss_client_grade_mgt_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_client_grade_rate,'%') AS gcss_client_grade_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_client_level_rate,'%') AS gcss_client_level_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_client_name_rate,'%') AS gcss_client_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_client_num_rate,'%') AS gcss_client_num_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_client_rate,'%') AS gcss_client_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_service_level_rate,'%') AS gcss_service_level_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_service_num_rate,'%') AS gcss_service_num_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_service_rate,'%') AS gcss_service_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_service_type_rate,'%') AS gcss_service_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.grid_name_rate,'%') AS grid_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.group_id_rate,'%') AS group_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.group_severity_rate,'%') AS group_severity_rate, CONCAT(t1.idn_rate,'%') AS idn_rate, CONCAT(t1.int_id_rate,'%') AS int_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.interrupt_circuit_state_rate,'%') AS interrupt_circuit_state_rate, CONCAT(t1.is_send_soundbrand_rate,'%') AS is_send_soundbrand_rate, CONCAT(t1.last_event_time_rate,'%') AS last_event_time_rate, CONCAT(t1.layer_rate_rate,'%') AS layer_rate_rate, CONCAT(t1.link_office_rate,'%') AS link_office_rate, CONCAT(t1.locate_info_rate,'%') AS locate_info_rate, CONCAT(t1.locate_name_rate,'%') AS locate_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.logic_alarm_type_rate,'%') AS logic_alarm_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.logic_sub_alarm_type_rate,'%') AS logic_sub_alarm_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.machine_room_info_rate,'%') AS machine_room_info_rate, CONCAT(t1.maintain_group_rate,'%') AS maintain_group_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_admin_status_rate,'%') AS ne_admin_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_alias_rate,'%') AS ne_alias_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_ip_rate,'%') AS ne_ip_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_location_rate,'%') AS ne_location_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_model_rate,'%') AS ne_model_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_status_rate,'%') AS ne_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_sub_type_rate,'%') AS ne_sub_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.network_type_rate,'%') AS network_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.network_type_top_rate,'%') AS network_type_top_rate, CONCAT(t1.nms_alarm_id_rate,'%') AS nms_alarm_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.nms_name_rate,'%') AS nms_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.object_class_text_rate,'%') AS object_class_text_rate, CONCAT(t1.object_level_rate,'%') AS object_level_rate, CONCAT(t1.omc_id_rate,'%') AS omc_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.org_type_rate,'%') AS org_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.Parent_Int_Id_rate,'%') AS Parent_Int_Id_rate, CONCAT(t1.Parent_Object_Class_rate,'%') AS Parent_Object_Class_rate, CONCAT(t1.port_num_rate,'%') AS port_num_rate, CONCAT(t1.preprocess_flag_rate,'%') AS preprocess_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.province_process_flag_rate,'%') AS province_process_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.redefine_severity_rate,'%') AS redefine_severity_rate, CONCAT(t1.redefine_type_rate,'%') AS redefine_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.region_name_rate,'%') AS region_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.region_severity_rate,'%') AS region_severity_rate, CONCAT(t1.related_tkgp_rate,'%') AS related_tkgp_rate, CONCAT(t1.remark_exist_rate,'%') AS remark_exist_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_eqp_alias_rate,'%') AS remote_eqp_alias_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_eqp_city_rate,'%') AS remote_eqp_city_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_eqp_label_rate,'%') AS remote_eqp_label_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_eqp_level_rate,'%') AS remote_eqp_level_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_eqp_region_rate,'%') AS remote_eqp_region_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_int_id_rate,'%') AS remote_int_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_object_class_rate,'%') AS remote_object_class_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_proj_sub_status_rate,'%') AS remote_proj_sub_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_resource_status_rate,'%') AS remote_resource_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.resource_status_rate,'%') AS resource_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.rlocate_ne_int_id_rate,'%') AS rlocate_ne_int_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.rlocate_ne_name_rate,'%') AS rlocate_ne_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.rlocate_ne_type_rate,'%') AS rlocate_ne_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.send_jt_flag_rate,'%') AS send_jt_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.severity_keycode_rate,'%') AS severity_keycode_rate, CONCAT(t1.signal_rate_rate,'%') AS signal_rate_rate, CONCAT(t1.site_no_rate,'%') AS site_no_rate, CONCAT(t1.site_property_unit_rate,'%') AS site_property_unit_rate, CONCAT(t1.site_type_rate,'%') AS site_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field10_rate,'%') AS special_field10_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field11_rate,'%') AS special_field11_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field12_rate,'%') AS special_field12_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field13_rate,'%') AS special_field13_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field14_rate,'%') AS special_field14_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field15_rate,'%') AS special_field15_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field16_rate,'%') AS special_field16_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field17_rate,'%') AS special_field17_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field18_rate,'%') AS special_field18_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field19_rate,'%') AS special_field19_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field2_rate,'%') AS special_field2_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field20_rate,'%') AS special_field20_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field21_rate,'%') AS special_field21_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field22_rate,'%') AS special_field22_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field23_rate,'%') AS special_field23_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field24_rate,'%') AS special_field24_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field25_rate,'%') AS special_field25_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field26_rate,'%') AS special_field26_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field27_rate,'%') AS special_field27_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field28_rate,'%') AS special_field28_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field29_rate,'%') AS special_field29_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field3_rate,'%') AS special_field3_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field30_rate,'%') AS special_field30_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field31_rate,'%') AS special_field31_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field4_rate,'%') AS special_field4_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field5_rate,'%') AS special_field5_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field6_rate,'%') AS special_field6_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field7_rate,'%') AS special_field7_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field8_rate,'%') AS special_field8_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field9_rate,'%') AS special_field9_rate, CONCAT(t1.stp_cat_rate,'%') AS stp_cat_rate, CONCAT(t1.sub_alarm_type_rate,'%') AS sub_alarm_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.sys_vendor_id_rate,'%') AS sys_vendor_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.time_stamp_c_rate,'%') AS time_stamp_c_rate, CONCAT(t1.time_stamp_rate,'%') AS time_stamp_rate, CONCAT(t1.tmsc_cat_rate,'%') AS tmsc_cat_rate, CONCAT(t1.type_keycode_rate,'%') AS type_keycode_rate, CONCAT(t1.vendor_name_rate,'%') AS vendor_name_rate FROM fmdb.tsm_check_alarm_complete t1,nmosdb.alarm_dict_mapper m1,nmosdb.tia_alarm_dict tia2 WHERE m1.dict_name = 'province_id' AND (m1.identifier in (${province}) or '-1' in (${province})) AND t1.province_id = m1.identifier AND (tia2.id = ${profession} or '-1' = ${profession}) AND tia2.TYPE = 1001 AND tia2.id = t1.professional_type AND (DATE(t1.check_time) BETWEEN LEFT('${time1}',10) AND LEFT('${time2}',10)) ORDER BY province ASC,professional ASC,DATE(t1.check_time) ASC ) a

select * from ( SELECT m1.VALUE AS province_name, tia2.txt AS professional, DATE_FORMAT(t1.check_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date_time, t1.alarm_total AS alarm_total, CONCAT(t1.region_id_rate,'%') AS region_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.city_id_rate,'%') AS city_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.vendor_id_rate,'%') AS vendor_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.active_status_rate,'%') AS active_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_resource_status_rate,'%') AS alarm_resource_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.sheet_send_status_rate,'%') AS sheet_send_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.sheet_status_rate,'%') AS sheet_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.org_severity_rate,'%') AS org_severity_rate, CONCAT(t1.standard_flag_rate,'%') AS standard_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.ack_flag_rate,'%') AS ack_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.object_class_rate,'%') AS object_class_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_object_class_rate,'%') AS eqp_object_class_rate, CONCAT(t1.event_time_rate,'%') AS event_time_rate, CONCAT(t1.cancel_time_rate,'%') AS cancel_time_rate, CONCAT(t1.omc_alarm_id_rate,'%') AS omc_alarm_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_title_text_rate,'%') AS alarm_title_text_rate, CONCAT(t1.vendor_severity_rate,'%') AS vendor_severity_rate, CONCAT(t1.vendor_type_rate,'%') AS vendor_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.probable_cause_txt_rate,'%') AS probable_cause_txt_rate, CONCAT(t1.probable_cause_rate,'%') AS probable_cause_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_label_rate,'%') AS ne_label_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_label_rate,'%') AS eqp_label_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field0_rate,'%') AS special_field0_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field1_rate,'%') AS special_field1_rate, CONCAT(t1.china_tower_site_no_rate,'%') AS china_tower_site_no_rate, CONCAT(t1.proj_name_rate,'%') AS proj_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.proj_oa_file_id_rate,'%') AS proj_oa_file_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.sheet_no_rate,'%') AS sheet_no_rate, CONCAT(t1.sheet_send_person_rate,'%') AS sheet_send_person_rate, CONCAT(t1.standard_alarm_name_rate,'%') AS standard_alarm_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.standard_alarm_id_rate,'%') AS standard_alarm_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.effect_ne_rate,'%') AS effect_ne_rate, CONCAT(t1.effect_service_rate,'%') AS effect_service_rate, CONCAT(t1.ems_id_rate,'%') AS ems_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.ack_time_rate,'%') AS ack_time_rate, CONCAT(t1.ack_user_rate,'%') AS ack_user_rate, CONCAT(t1.admin_grid_id_rate,'%') AS admin_grid_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_abnormal_type_rate,'%') AS alarm_abnormal_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_act_count_rate,'%') AS alarm_act_count_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_check_rate,'%') AS alarm_check_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_content_rate,'%') AS alarm_content_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_eqp_status_rate,'%') AS alarm_eqp_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.Alarm_Explanation_addition_rate,'%') AS Alarm_Explanation_addition_rate, CONCAT(t1.ALARM_EXPLANATION_rate,'%') AS ALARM_EXPLANATION_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_important_level_rate,'%') AS alarm_important_level_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_ne_status_rate,'%') AS alarm_ne_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_origin_rate,'%') AS alarm_origin_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_reason_rate,'%') AS alarm_reason_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_source_rate,'%') AS alarm_source_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_title_rate,'%') AS alarm_title_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_unit_rate,'%') AS alarm_unit_rate, CONCAT(t1.alarm_value_rate,'%') AS alarm_value_rate, CONCAT(t1.alert_status_rate,'%') AS alert_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.attachment_rate,'%') AS attachment_rate, CONCAT(t1.board_type_rate,'%') AS board_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.business_layer_rate,'%') AS business_layer_rate, CONCAT(t1.business_region_ids_rate,'%') AS business_region_ids_rate, CONCAT(t1.business_regions_rate,'%') AS business_regions_rate, CONCAT(t1.business_system_rate,'%') AS business_system_rate, CONCAT(t1.cancel_user_rate,'%') AS cancel_user_rate, CONCAT(t1.channel_num_rate,'%') AS channel_num_rate, CONCAT(t1.channel_type_rate,'%') AS channel_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.circuit_fault_location_rate,'%') AS circuit_fault_location_rate, CONCAT(t1.circuit_id_rate,'%') AS circuit_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.circuit_no_rate,'%') AS circuit_no_rate, CONCAT(t1.corr_str_rate,'%') AS corr_str_rate, CONCAT(t1.correlate_alarm_flag_rate,'%') AS correlate_alarm_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.dal_action_rate,'%') AS dal_action_rate, CONCAT(t1.department_process_flag_rate,'%') AS department_process_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_alias_rate,'%') AS eqp_alias_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_idn_rate,'%') AS eqp_idn_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_int_id_rate,'%') AS eqp_int_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_object_class_text_rate,'%') AS eqp_object_class_text_rate, CONCAT(t1.eqp_version_rate,'%') AS eqp_version_rate, CONCAT(t1.event_cat_rate,'%') AS event_cat_rate, CONCAT(t1.event_id_rate,'%') AS event_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.extra_id1_rate,'%') AS extra_id1_rate, CONCAT(t1.extra_id2_rate,'%') AS extra_id2_rate, CONCAT(t1.extra_id3_rate,'%') AS extra_id3_rate, CONCAT(t1.extra_string1_rate,'%') AS extra_string1_rate, CONCAT(t1.extra_string2_rate,'%') AS extra_string2_rate, CONCAT(t1.extra_string3_rate,'%') AS extra_string3_rate, CONCAT(t1.fail_reason_rate,'%') AS fail_reason_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_client_grade_mgt_rate,'%') AS gcss_client_grade_mgt_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_client_grade_rate,'%') AS gcss_client_grade_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_client_level_rate,'%') AS gcss_client_level_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_client_name_rate,'%') AS gcss_client_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_client_num_rate,'%') AS gcss_client_num_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_client_rate,'%') AS gcss_client_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_service_level_rate,'%') AS gcss_service_level_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_service_num_rate,'%') AS gcss_service_num_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_service_rate,'%') AS gcss_service_rate, CONCAT(t1.gcss_service_type_rate,'%') AS gcss_service_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.grid_name_rate,'%') AS grid_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.group_id_rate,'%') AS group_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.group_severity_rate,'%') AS group_severity_rate, CONCAT(t1.idn_rate,'%') AS idn_rate, CONCAT(t1.int_id_rate,'%') AS int_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.interrupt_circuit_state_rate,'%') AS interrupt_circuit_state_rate, CONCAT(t1.is_send_soundbrand_rate,'%') AS is_send_soundbrand_rate, CONCAT(t1.last_event_time_rate,'%') AS last_event_time_rate, CONCAT(t1.layer_rate_rate,'%') AS layer_rate_rate, CONCAT(t1.link_office_rate,'%') AS link_office_rate, CONCAT(t1.locate_info_rate,'%') AS locate_info_rate, CONCAT(t1.locate_name_rate,'%') AS locate_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.logic_alarm_type_rate,'%') AS logic_alarm_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.logic_sub_alarm_type_rate,'%') AS logic_sub_alarm_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.machine_room_info_rate,'%') AS machine_room_info_rate, CONCAT(t1.maintain_group_rate,'%') AS maintain_group_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_admin_status_rate,'%') AS ne_admin_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_alias_rate,'%') AS ne_alias_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_ip_rate,'%') AS ne_ip_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_location_rate,'%') AS ne_location_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_model_rate,'%') AS ne_model_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_status_rate,'%') AS ne_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.ne_sub_type_rate,'%') AS ne_sub_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.network_type_rate,'%') AS network_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.network_type_top_rate,'%') AS network_type_top_rate, CONCAT(t1.nms_alarm_id_rate,'%') AS nms_alarm_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.nms_name_rate,'%') AS nms_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.object_class_text_rate,'%') AS object_class_text_rate, CONCAT(t1.object_level_rate,'%') AS object_level_rate, CONCAT(t1.omc_id_rate,'%') AS omc_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.org_type_rate,'%') AS org_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.Parent_Int_Id_rate,'%') AS Parent_Int_Id_rate, CONCAT(t1.Parent_Object_Class_rate,'%') AS Parent_Object_Class_rate, CONCAT(t1.port_num_rate,'%') AS port_num_rate, CONCAT(t1.preprocess_flag_rate,'%') AS preprocess_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.province_process_flag_rate,'%') AS province_process_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.redefine_severity_rate,'%') AS redefine_severity_rate, CONCAT(t1.redefine_type_rate,'%') AS redefine_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.region_name_rate,'%') AS region_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.region_severity_rate,'%') AS region_severity_rate, CONCAT(t1.related_tkgp_rate,'%') AS related_tkgp_rate, CONCAT(t1.remark_exist_rate,'%') AS remark_exist_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_eqp_alias_rate,'%') AS remote_eqp_alias_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_eqp_city_rate,'%') AS remote_eqp_city_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_eqp_label_rate,'%') AS remote_eqp_label_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_eqp_level_rate,'%') AS remote_eqp_level_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_eqp_region_rate,'%') AS remote_eqp_region_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_int_id_rate,'%') AS remote_int_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_object_class_rate,'%') AS remote_object_class_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_proj_sub_status_rate,'%') AS remote_proj_sub_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.remote_resource_status_rate,'%') AS remote_resource_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.resource_status_rate,'%') AS resource_status_rate, CONCAT(t1.rlocate_ne_int_id_rate,'%') AS rlocate_ne_int_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.rlocate_ne_name_rate,'%') AS rlocate_ne_name_rate, CONCAT(t1.rlocate_ne_type_rate,'%') AS rlocate_ne_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.send_jt_flag_rate,'%') AS send_jt_flag_rate, CONCAT(t1.severity_keycode_rate,'%') AS severity_keycode_rate, CONCAT(t1.signal_rate_rate,'%') AS signal_rate_rate, CONCAT(t1.site_no_rate,'%') AS site_no_rate, CONCAT(t1.site_property_unit_rate,'%') AS site_property_unit_rate, CONCAT(t1.site_type_rate,'%') AS site_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field10_rate,'%') AS special_field10_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field11_rate,'%') AS special_field11_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field12_rate,'%') AS special_field12_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field13_rate,'%') AS special_field13_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field14_rate,'%') AS special_field14_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field15_rate,'%') AS special_field15_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field16_rate,'%') AS special_field16_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field17_rate,'%') AS special_field17_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field18_rate,'%') AS special_field18_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field19_rate,'%') AS special_field19_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field2_rate,'%') AS special_field2_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field20_rate,'%') AS special_field20_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field21_rate,'%') AS special_field21_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field22_rate,'%') AS special_field22_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field23_rate,'%') AS special_field23_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field24_rate,'%') AS special_field24_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field25_rate,'%') AS special_field25_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field26_rate,'%') AS special_field26_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field27_rate,'%') AS special_field27_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field28_rate,'%') AS special_field28_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field29_rate,'%') AS special_field29_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field3_rate,'%') AS special_field3_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field30_rate,'%') AS special_field30_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field31_rate,'%') AS special_field31_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field4_rate,'%') AS special_field4_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field5_rate,'%') AS special_field5_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field6_rate,'%') AS special_field6_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field7_rate,'%') AS special_field7_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field8_rate,'%') AS special_field8_rate, CONCAT(t1.special_field9_rate,'%') AS special_field9_rate, CONCAT(t1.stp_cat_rate,'%') AS stp_cat_rate, CONCAT(t1.sub_alarm_type_rate,'%') AS sub_alarm_type_rate, CONCAT(t1.sys_vendor_id_rate,'%') AS sys_vendor_id_rate, CONCAT(t1.time_stamp_c_rate,'%') AS time_stamp_c_rate, CONCAT(t1.time_stamp_rate,'%') AS time_stamp_rate, CONCAT(t1.tmsc_cat_rate,'%') AS tmsc_cat_rate, CONCAT(t1.type_keycode_rate,'%') AS type_keycode_rate, CONCAT(t1.vendor_name_rate,'%') AS vendor_name_rate FROM fmdb.tsm_check_alarm_complete t1,nmosdb.alarm_dict_mapper m1,nmosdb.tia_alarm_dict tia2 WHERE m1.dict_name = 'province_id' AND (m1.identifier in (${province}) or '-1' in (${province})) AND t1.province_id = m1.identifier AND (tia2.id = ${profession} or '-1' = ${profession}) AND tia2.TYPE = 1001 AND tia2.id = t1.professional_type AND (DATE(t1.check_time) BETWEEN LEFT('${time1}',10) AND LEFT('${time2}',10)) ORDER BY province_name ASC,professional ASC,DATE(t1.check_time) ASC) a limit ${BegeinIndex},${PageSize}
select '日' as txt, 1 id from dual union all select '月' as txt, 3 id from dual
SELECT value as txt, identifier as id FROM nmosdb.alarm_dict_mapper WHERE dict_name = 'province_id' ORDER BY order_field ASC

SELECT m.id id,m.txt txt FROM (SELECT DISTINCT region_id id,region_name txt,pcode pcode_2 FROM region_city WHERE (province_id IN (${province_id}) OR '-1' IN (${province_id}))) m ORDER BY m.pcode_2 ASC
select txt,id FROM tia_alarm_dict tia2 WHERE tia2.TYPE = 1001 ORDER BY tia2.type_name_en ASC

select count(*) num from( SELECT DISTINCT c1.province_name AS province_name,m1.VALUE AS region_name,tia2.txt AS professional_name, SUBSTRING_INDEX(s1.send_rule,'_',-1) AS rule, DATE_FORMAT(s1.forward_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date_time, COUNT(DISTINCT s1.fp0) AS alarm_total,COUNT(DISTINCT s1.sheet_no) AS sheet_total FROM alarm_dict_mapper m1,tfa_alarmsheetinfo s1,tia_alarm_dict tia2,region_city c1 WHERE m1.dict_name = 'region_id' AND (m1.identifier in (${region}) or '-1' in (${region})) AND s1.region_id = m1.identifier AND c1.region_id = s1.region_id AND (tia2.id = ${profession} or '-1' = ${profession}) AND tia2.TYPE = 1001 AND tia2.id = s1.professional_type AND s1.sheet_send_status IN (5,6,7,10,11,12) AND (locate('${rules}', s1.send_rule) > 0 or '-1' = '${rules}') AND (DATE(s1.forward_time) BETWEEN LEFT('${time1}',10) AND LEFT('${time2}',10)) AND (c1.province_id in (${province}) or '-1' in (${province})) GROUP BY date_time,c1.province_name,m1.VALUE,tia2.txt,s1.send_rule ORDER BY province_name ASC,region_name ASC,professional_name ASC,rule ASC,date_time ASC ) b

select * from ( SELECT DISTINCT c1.province_name AS province_name,m1.VALUE AS region_name,tia2.txt AS professional_name, SUBSTRING_INDEX(s1.send_rule,'_',-1) AS rule, DATE_FORMAT(s1.forward_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date_time, COUNT(DISTINCT s1.fp0) AS alarm_total,COUNT(DISTINCT s1.sheet_no) AS sheet_total FROM alarm_dict_mapper m1,tfa_alarmsheetinfo s1,tia_alarm_dict tia2,region_city c1 WHERE m1.dict_name = 'region_id' AND (m1.identifier in (${region}) or '-1' in (${region})) AND s1.region_id = m1.identifier AND c1.region_id = s1.region_id AND (tia2.id = ${profession} or '-1' = ${profession}) AND tia2.TYPE = 1001 AND tia2.id = s1.professional_type AND s1.sheet_send_status IN (5,6,7,10,11,12) AND (locate('${rules}', s1.send_rule) > 0 or '-1' = '${rules}') AND (DATE(s1.forward_time) BETWEEN LEFT('${time1}',10) AND LEFT('${time2}',10)) AND (c1.province_id in (${province}) or '-1' in (${province})) GROUP BY date_time,c1.province_name,m1.VALUE,tia2.txt,s1.send_rule ORDER BY province_name ASC,region_name ASC,professional_name ASC,rule ASC,date_time ASC) a limit ${BegeinIndex},${PageSize}
select '日' as txt, 1 id from dual union all select '周' as txt, 2 id from dual union all select '月' as txt, 3 id from dual
select distinct nms_name as txt,omc_id as id from tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum

select '虚拟机' as txt, 508 as id from dual union all select '宿主机' as txt, 1521 as id from dual union all select '物理机' as txt, 502 as id from dual union all select '交换机' as txt, 905 as id from dual union all select '防火墙' as txt, 901 as id from dual union all select '虚拟存储' as txt, 1514 as id from dual union all select '应用' as txt, 506 as id from dual union all select '服务' as txt, 1520 as id from dual

select count(*) num from ( select tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.first_result a_cloumn_00, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.nms_name a_cloumn_01, meta_objects.ZH_NAME a_cloumn_02, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.eqp_label a_cloumn_03, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.org_severity a_cloumn_04, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.alarm_title_text a_cloumn_05, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.event_time a_cloumn_06, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.cancel_time a_cloumn_07 from tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail,(select ZH_NAME,OBJECT_CLASS from meta_objects where object_class in(508,1521,502,905,901,1514,506,1520)) meta_objects where first_result =to_date(#{first_result},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') and eqp_object_class = #{eqp_object_class} and nms_name = #{g1} and eqp_label = #{g3} and alarm_title_text = #{g4} and tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.eqp_object_class =meta_objects.object_class ${DetailWhereCondition} )
